name: Honey-Ginger Snaps
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F.
1. Cream together the honey, butter, and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the egg and mix well.
3. Sift in the flour, baking soda, salt, ginger, cinnamon, and cloves; stir until combined.
4. Chill the dough for one hour.
5. Roll the dough into level tablespoons and place them 2 inches apart on a greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes.
Makes about 4 dozen.
